assertions.description: The components list correctly enumerates all 5 component instances (4x AE-SPM0405HD4H U? microphones and 1x Conn_01x05 J? connector). The VDD and GND power rails are correctly identified. The BOM correctly identifies the SPM0405HD4H as the primary device.
assertions.aspirational_reason: agent-generated check failed: expected match for //, got no match in 2 items

assertions.description: INCORRECT: The raw PDM.sch has 20 $Comp entries: 4x AE-SPM0405HD4H (all ref=U?) and 1 Conn_01x05 (J?), plus 15 power symbols. The output reports total_components=2 (unique refs only) and the BOM shows only 2 entries (Conn_01x05 qty=1, AE-SPM0405HD4H qty=1) instead of qty=4 for the microphone. The components list correctly shows 5 entries, but the statistics misrepresent the actual design density.
